# FutureMarketingAI (FMai)

> FMai is a Dutch AI implementation agency that builds intelligent chatbots, workflow automations, voice agents, and full-stack AI marketing machines for SaaS and e-commerce companies. Founded by Daley, FMai helps B2B companies automate customer interactions, streamline operations, and scale marketing through AI-powered systems built on n8n, Next.js, and Anthropic Claude. Based in the Netherlands, serving clients across Europe and internationally.

FMai operates as a premium mid-market AI agency with three gateway service tiers: Starter (EUR 1.497/mo), Growth (EUR 2.497/mo), and Scale (EUR 3.997/mo). The flagship product is the AI Marketing Machine, an automated content creation and distribution system. The company positions approximately 50% below premium agency pricing while delivering enterprise-grade AI implementations.

- Brand: FMai (FutureMarketingAI)
- Domain: futuremarketingai.com
- Founder: Daley
- Location: Netherlands (EU), Estonian e-Residency
- Languages: Dutch, English
- Tech stack: n8n, Next.js, Anthropic Claude, Vercel, TypeScript
- Contact: Available via website contact form and Calendly booking

## Services

- [AI Chatbots](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/chatbots): Custom AI chatbots for customer support, lead qualification, appointment booking, and sales automation across website, WhatsApp, Slack, and other channels
- [Workflow Automations](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/automations): End-to-end business process automation using n8n and AI for lead qualification, email sequences, CRM sync, invoice handling, and onboarding
- [Voice Agents](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/voice-agents): AI-powered voice assistants for inbound support and outbound sales calls, built with specialized voice AI partners
- [AI Marketing Machine](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/marketing-machine): Flagship automated content creation system producing up to 160 posts per month across carousels, reels, ads, and stories

## Company

- [About FMai](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/about): Company background, mission, founder story, and direct founder access guarantee
- [Pricing](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/pricing): Three service tiers (Starter, Growth, Scale) with transparent pricing and 3-month risk-free trial
- [How It Works](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/how-it-works): Delivery process from AI audit through build, launch, and ongoing optimization (1-3 weeks typical)
- [Contact](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/contact): Book a free 30-minute AI audit and discovery call

## Optional

- [Blog](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/blog): Articles on AI implementation, automation strategies, and marketing technology
- [Legal](https://futuremarketingai.com/en/legal): Privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie policy
